message:
fix(frontend): mission-control cleanup leaks, deploy poll visibility, StatefulSet config (#6629-#6642) (#6653)

* fix(frontend): mission-control cleanup leaks + fire-and-forget tracking

- #6629: ref-track wsSend retry setTimeouts and clear them on unmount so
  retries can't fire on a dying socket or an unmounted provider.
- #6632: add isMountedRef to LaunchSequence so phase-init, mission-monitor,
  and updateProgress paths don't call onUpdateProgress/onComplete on a
  closed dialog.
- #6634: collect launchProject promises in yolo mode and on the Retry
  Failed click handler so rejections aren't swallowed as unhandled.

#6630, #6631, #6637 were reported against useMissions.tsx:434, :438, :760
but the existing cleanup useEffect (around lines 2527-2575) already
clears cancelTimeouts, waitingInputTimeouts, and wsReconnectTimer on
unmount. No changes needed for those three.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(frontend): bound deploy poll concurrency and pause on hidden tab

- #6640: replace the nested Promise.all(missions × clusters) fan-out
  with a bounded runWithConcurrency helper capped at 6 in-flight
  cluster fetches. Missions are processed sequentially so a user with
  many active missions can't DoS their own backend every POLL_INTERVAL_MS.
- #6641: integrate the Page Visibility API. When the tab goes hidden,
  tear down the poll interval so throttled/deferred ticks don't pile up;
  on resume, fire one immediate poll and restart the interval. Also
  respect an initial-hidden state so opening the app in a background
  tab doesn't start polling until the user actually looks at it.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(cards): StatefulSet card was pinned to demo data (#6642)

statefulSetStatusConfig had isDemoData: true, which forced the card
to render as demo data even when the useStatefulSets hook returned
real data. Flip to false to match deployment-status and pod-status;
the hook's own isDemoData signal still controls the Demo badge and
yellow outline when live data is unavailable.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
